title: Ethnicity and the Criminal Justice System 2024
body: "Details  The areas of focus include: Victimisation, Police Activity, Defendants, Offender Management, Offender Characteristics, Offence Analysis, and Practitioners.  This is the latest biennial compendium of Statistics on Ethnicity and the Criminal Justice System and follows on from its sister publication Statistics on Women and the Criminal Justice System, 2021. "
